targets.rawSql: SELECT count() AS value FROM wikimedia.events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
SELECT uniq(user) AS value FROM wikimedia.events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
SELECT count() AS value FROM wikimedia.events WHERE wiki_type = 'new' AND $__timeFilter(event_time)
SELECT round(100.0 * countIf(bot = 1) / count(), 1) AS value FROM wikimedia.events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
SELECT round(100.0 * countIf(match(user, '^\d')) / count(), 1) AS value FROM wikimedia.events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
SELECT round(100.0 * countIf(comment ILIKE '%revert%' OR comment ILIKE '%undo%' OR startsWith(comment, 'Reverted')) / count(), 1) AS value FROM wikimedia.events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)

SELECT toStartOfInterval(event_time, INTERVAL greatest($__interval_s, 60) second) AS time, countIf(bot = 0) AS "Human Edits", countIf(bot = 1) AS "Bot Edits" FROM wikimedia.events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time ASC
SELECT server_name, count() AS edits FROM wikimedia.events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) GROUP BY server_name ORDER BY edits DESC LIMIT 10
SELECT wiki_type, count() AS count FROM wikimedia.events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) GROUP BY wiki_type ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT if(wikidata_label != '', wikidata_label, title) AS label, title, wikidata_description AS description, server_name, count() AS edits FROM wikimedia.events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) AND namespace = 0 AND bot = 0 GROUP BY title, wikidata_label, wikidata_description, server_name ORDER BY edits DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT countIf(comment ILIKE '%revert%' OR comment ILIKE '%undo%' OR startsWith(comment, 'Reverted')) AS value FROM wikimedia.events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
SELECT round(100.0 * countIf(comment ILIKE '%revert%' OR comment ILIKE '%undo%' OR startsWith(comment, 'Reverted')) / count(), 1) AS value FROM wikimedia.events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
SELECT countIf(bot = 1 AND (comment ILIKE '%revert%' OR comment ILIKE '%undo%' OR startsWith(comment, 'Reverted'))) AS value FROM wikimedia.events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
SELECT countIf(bot = 0 AND (comment ILIKE '%revert%' OR comment ILIKE '%undo%' OR startsWith(comment, 'Reverted'))) AS value FROM wikimedia.events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)

SELECT toStartOfInterval(event_time, INTERVAL greatest($__interval_s, 60) second) AS time, countIf(bot = 1) AS "Bot", countIf(bot = 0 AND match(user, '^\d')) AS "Anonymous", countIf(bot = 0 AND NOT match(user, '^\d')) AS "Registered" FROM wikimedia.events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT toStartOfInterval(event_time, INTERVAL greatest($__interval_s, 60) second) AS time, countIf(bot = 0 AND match(user, '^\d')) AS "Anon Edits", countIf(comment ILIKE '%revert%' OR comment ILIKE '%undo%' OR startsWith(comment, 'Reverted')) AS "All Reverts", countIf(bot = 1 AND (comment ILIKE '%revert%' OR comment ILIKE '%undo%' OR startsWith(comment, 'Reverted'))) AS "Bot Reverts" FROM wikimedia.events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time ASC

panels.title: Vandalism Pressure: Anon Edits vs Reverts vs Bot Reverts

targets.rawSql: SELECT if(wikidata_label != '', wikidata_label, title) AS label, server_name, count() AS total_edits, countIf(comment ILIKE '%revert%' OR comment ILIKE '%undo%' OR startsWith(comment, 'Reverted')) AS reverts, round(100.0 * countIf(comment ILIKE '%revert%' OR comment ILIKE '%undo%' OR startsWith(comment, 'Reverted')) / count(), 1) AS revert_rate_pct FROM wikimedia.events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) AND namespace = 0 GROUP BY title, wikidata_label, server_name HAVING reverts > 0 ORDER BY reverts DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT round(count() / 5.0, 1) AS value FROM wikimedia.events WHERE event_time > now() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE
SELECT round(countIf(bot = 0 AND NOT match(user, '^\d')) / 5.0, 1) AS value FROM wikimedia.events WHERE event_time > now() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE
SELECT round(countIf(bot = 1) / 5.0, 1) AS value FROM wikimedia.events WHERE event_time > now() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE
SELECT round(countIf(match(user, '^\d') AND bot = 0) / 5.0, 1) AS value FROM wikimedia.events WHERE event_time > now() - INTERVAL 5 MINUTE

SELECT toStartOfInterval(event_time, INTERVAL greatest($__interval_s, 60) second) AS time, round(count() * 60.0 / greatest($__interval_s, 60), 1) AS "Total", round(countIf(bot = 0 AND NOT match(user, '^\d')) * 60.0 / greatest($__interval_s, 60), 1) AS "Human", round(countIf(bot = 1) * 60.0 / greatest($__interval_s, 60), 1) AS "Bot", round(countIf(match(user, '^\d') AND bot = 0) * 60.0 / greatest($__interval_s, 60), 1) AS "Anonymous" FROM wikimedia.events WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time ASC

SELECT if(wikidata_label NOT IN ('', '-'), wikidata_label, title) AS label, server_name, countIf(event_time > now() - INTERVAL 15 MINUTE) AS edits_15m, countIf(event_time BETWEEN now() - INTERVAL 75 MINUTE AND now() - INTERVAL 15 MINUTE) AS edits_prev_60m, round(countIf(event_time > now() - INTERVAL 15 MINUTE) * 4.0 / (countIf(event_time BETWEEN now() - INTERVAL 75 MINUTE AND now() - INTERVAL 15 MINUTE) + 1), 1) AS spike_ratio FROM wikimedia.events WHERE event_time > now() - INTERVAL 75 MINUTE AND namespace = 0 GROUP BY title, wikidata_label, server_name HAVING edits_15m >= 3 ORDER BY spike_ratio DESC LIMIT 15

panels.title: Trending Articles — spike ratio (last 15m vs baseline)

targets.rawSql: SELECT title, uniq(server_name) AS wiki_count, count() AS total_edits, arrayStringConcat(groupUniqArray(server_name), ', ') AS wikis FROM wikimedia.events WHERE event_time > now() - INTERVAL 15 MINUTE AND namespace = 0 GROUP BY title HAVING wiki_count >= 2 ORDER BY wiki_count DESC, total_edits DESC LIMIT 15

panels.title: Cross-wiki Trending — same topic across languages (last 15m)
